LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants 860 Restaurant Llc Dba Oola Restaurant And Bar And Four Ps Group Llc
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS LLC's Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants 860 Restaurant LLC dba Oola Restaurant And Bar And Four PS Group LLC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Oakville Produce Partners LLC's motion for entry of judgment, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Judgment shall be entered against Defendants 860 Restaurant LLC dba Oola Restaurant and Bar and Four P'S Group LLC pursuant to the executed Agreement for Entry of Judgment in the amount of $22,333.02, representing $21,473.02 in principal, attorney's fees in the amount of $800.00, and court costs of $60.00.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Set Aside Order Of Dismissal Entered On December 6, 2022 (Ccp 473(B))
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS LLC's Motion To Set Aside Order Of Dismissal Entered On December 6, 2022 (CCP 473(B)).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside dismissal entered on December 6, 2022 (CCP 473(b)" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES: No Appearance Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the court orders the case dismiss pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge Samuel K. Feng; Clerk VWU; Not Reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants 860 Restaurant Llc Dba Oola Restaurant And Four Ps Group Llc
Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Continued To Mar-30-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS 860 RESTAURANT LLC DBA OOLA RESTAURANT AND FOUR PS GROUP LLC.

No appearances. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to March 30, 2020 at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, (E: maria.torreano@gmail.com) (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants 860 Restaurant Llc Dba Oola Restaurant And Four Ps Group Llc
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Continued To Mar-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Dave Greenlee, T:415.812.7984 and Jeff Handy, T:415.254.2513, representing defendants in both cases;
No appearance by plaintiff.

RULING: Cases CGC-19-572517 and CGC-19-572518 were heard simultaneously. The motions were unopposed and the tentative rulings uncontested. However, Mr. Greenlee informed the Court that the defendants have submitted a settlement proposal to the plaintiffs and have been negotiating with them in good faith. They did not think the hearings would move forward. Therefore, finding good cause, the Court held off entering the order and judgment and ordered that,

PLAINTIFF OAKVILLE PRODUCE PARTNERS LLC's Motion For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants 860 Restaurant LLC dba Oola Restaurant And Four P's Group LLC is continued to March 16, 2020 at 9:30am in Department 302.

Defendants to notify the plaintiff of the continued hearing date. Plaintiff shall notify the court by email if an agreement is reached before the hearing. Otherwise, parties must appear at the hearing during which time the court intends to enter an order and a judmgnet in each case.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
